title: SOPA and SIMPA: normalized single-sample integrated multiomics pathway analysis of tumor heterogeneity in solid cancers.
snippet: Inter-sample tumor heterogeneity poses significant challenges to metastatic cancer treatment. Although multiomics analyses provide nuanced molecular insights into tumor heterogeneity, current molecular pathway analysis tools focus on group-based comparisons, which may overlook differential single-sample perturbations. Here, we present normalized single-samp...
